AI industry news Live
Model
GPT-4o achieves new throughput record on H200 SXM — 4,820 tokens/sec in MLPerf v4.1
2h ago · mlperf.org
Cost
Anthropic cuts Claude 3 Haiku pricing by 25% — now $0.25/1M input tokens
4h ago · anthropic.com
Agent
OpenAI launches Assistants v2 with 128K context and multi-agent orchestration support
6h ago · openai.com
Infra
AMD MI300X outperforms H100 on long-context inference at 32K tokens — 192GB HBM3 advantage
8h ago · amd.com
Cost
AWS announces AI-optimised EC2 instances P5en with 800Gbps networking for LLM workloads
12h ago · aws.amazon.com
Model
Meta releases Llama 3.1 405B — largest open-source model with 128K context window
1d ago · ai.meta.com
Agent
Google DeepMind's Gemini 1.5 Pro sets new benchmark on long-document reasoning tasks
1d ago · deepmind.google
Platform architecture
THE FULL
AI AGENTIC STACK

Five layers — from business use case to model selection, data integration, governance, monitoring, and cost visibility. Argovaa covers the whole stack.

Agent Builder — domain templates, wizard flow, deploy
Benchmark Studio — model, latency, cost, quality
Reliability Suite — golden signals, SRE observability
Tokenomics & TCO — true cost per AI request
Customer Snippet Hub — telemetry, dashboards, integrations

AGENT BUILDER
Finance · Healthcare · Retail · Technology · HR · Sales

Compare →

Platform modules
EVERYTHING YOU NEED
TO BECOME AN AI BUSINESS

Five integrated modules — from building your first agent to benchmarking model performance, monitoring reliability, tracking true cost, and embedding telemetry into your stack.

01 —
◈
AGENT BUILDER
Build domain-specific AI agents using templates, tools, memory, workflow actions, governance, and deployment controls. Finance, healthcare, retail, technology, and more.
New20+ templates5min deploy
02 —
◉
BENCHMARK STUDIO
Compare models, prompts, tools, and infrastructure for latency, quality, cost, and reliability. 360+ models across NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPUs. MLPerf v4.1 data.
Live data360+ modelsMLPerf v4.1
03 —
◎
RELIABILITY SUITE
Monitor golden signals across agent runtime, model calls, tools, integrations, data pipelines, and user-facing workflows. Throughput, availability, latency, errors.
SRE4 golden signalsAlerts
04 —
◧
TOKENOMICS & TCO
Understand the real cost of every AI request across model tokens, retries, tools, AWS CPU/GPU infrastructure and services. True cost per request, not just token spend.
AWS CURLLM tokensTrue TCO
05 —
◫
CUSTOMER SNIPPET HUB
Let customers plug telemetry snippets into their applications and instantly populate Argovaa dashboards. JS, Node.js, and Python. Log in to access production code.
JS · Node · PythonLogin required
06 —
◬
PRICING INTELLIGENCE
On-demand, provisioned throughput, and batch tier modelling. Compare cost across all pricing tiers and find your break-even before committing to capacity.
3 tier typesBreak-even calc

SRE reliability suite
GOLDEN SIGNALS FOR
AI AGENTS

Four primary signals — throughput, availability, latency, and errors — across every agent, model call, tool, and integration in your stack.

2,840
Throughput
req/min
↑ 12% vs last hour
99.94%
Availability
last 30 days
SLA target: 99.9%
284ms
Latency P95
end-to-end
TTFT avg: 128ms
0.06%
Error rate
below threshold
Alert: >1%
Telemetry snippets — sign in to access production code
JavaScript browser 🔒 Login required 
window.ArgovaaConfig = {
  apiKey: "YOUR_PUBLIC_CLIENT_KEY",
  service: "customer-agent-app",
  environment: "production",
  dashboardId: "golden-signals"
};

// Tracks throughput, latency, errors
// automatically on every agent call
🔒 Log in to view implementation code
Sign in to unlock
Python API 🔒 Login required 
from argovaa.telemetry import ArgovaaTelemetry

argovaa = ArgovaaTelemetry(
    api_key=os.environ["ARGOVAA_API_KEY"],
    service="agent-runtime-api",
    environment="production"
)

def run_agent(request):
    with argovaa.trace("agent_request") as t:
        # traces throughput, latency, errors
🔒 Log in to view implementation code
Sign in to unlock
Tokenomics & true cost
KNOW YOUR TRUE COST
PER AI REQUEST

Blend AWS CPU/GPU Infrastructure and Services costs, LLM token spend, and service overhead into one number — the real cost of every agent call.

$0.00031
AWS CPU/GPU infrastructure & services
EC2 · ECS · Lambda · RDS · S3 · Networking — from your AWS CUR file, attributed per request.
$0.00048
LLM token cost
Input + output tokens · model rate · pricing tier (on-demand, provisioned, batch).
$0.00008
Service overhead
Storage · observability · retries · tool calls · data pipeline costs per request.
True cost per request
$0.00087
This is what one AI agent request actually costs your business — not just the LLM token fee. Run the full TCO calculator with your own AWS CUR file and usage data.
Open TCO dashboard →
